name: Fortuitous Encounter → Legacy
summary: A humiliated weakling, isolated by a fall or banishment, discovers a relic or dying master, is tested, and receives a hidden legacy at the cost of a binding debt.

beats.label: Isolation after the fall
beats.intent: strand the protagonist beyond help, at their lowest

beats.label: Discover the relic/master
beats.intent: the chance encounter that changes everything

beats.label: Trial by the legacy
beats.intent: the mentor or relic tests worthiness

beats.label: Receive the legacy at a cost
beats.intent: grant power bound to a debt or secret

preconditions.text: the protagonist is weak, humiliated, or cast out

effects.text: the protagonist gains a hidden power or technique
a debt or secret tie to the mentor is created

examples.text: Cast into a sealed ravine, the weakling stumbles on a dying master who tests then gifts a forbidden art — bound by a debt of loyalty.

name: Closed-Door Breakthrough
summary: Sealed away to break a stagnant rank, the cultivator confronts an inner wall, endures a heavenly trial, brushes death, and ascends a realm.

beats.label: Enter seclusion
beats.intent: withdraw to break the bottleneck

beats.label: Hit the inner wall
beats.intent: the stagnant rank resists

beats.label: Sudden insight
beats.intent: a comprehension cracks the wall

beats.label: Heavenly trial
beats.intent: the heavens test the ascent

beats.label: Brush with death
beats.intent: the trial nearly kills the cultivator

beats.label: Ascend a realm
beats.intent: survive and break through

preconditions.text: the protagonist is blocked at a cultivation bottleneck
a measure of resources or insight is at hand

effects.text: the protagonist advances a realm or rank
their reputation and power visibly rise

examples.text: Sealed away to break a stagnant rank, the cultivator faces an inner wall, a heavenly trial, near-death, then ascends a realm.

name: Face-Slap Reversal
summary: An arrogant party mocks the underestimated protagonist, who then reveals hidden power and turns the humiliation back on the mocker before witnesses.

beats.label: Arrogant party mocks
beats.intent: the proud heir sneers at the protagonist

beats.label: Protagonist underestimated
beats.intent: the crowd writes them off

beats.label: Hidden power revealed
beats.intent: the protagonist unveils a higher art

beats.label: Humiliation reversed
beats.intent: the mocker is publicly broken

preconditions.text: the protagonist is publicly underestimated or insulted
the protagonist secretly holds power beyond their apparent rank

effects.text: the protagonist's true strength is revealed to witnesses
the arrogant party is humiliated and made an enemy

examples.text: A preening heir sneers at the 'trash'; mid-contest the trash unveils a higher art and the heir is publicly broken.

name: Trash-to-Genius Vindication
summary: A hidden affliction scorned as crippling is diagnosed as a rare gift; the very flaw becomes the engine of ascent and the protagonist is vindicated.

roles.label: elder / diagnostician
constraints: able to read the true constitution

beats.label: Hidden affliction
beats.intent: the protagonist is treated as crippled

beats.label: Affliction explained
beats.intent: the flaw is read as a rare constitution

beats.label: Affliction becomes a gift
beats.intent: the flaw drives an impossible ascent

beats.label: Vindication
beats.intent: the scorners are proven wrong

preconditions.text: the protagonist is dismissed as talentless or crippled

effects.text: the protagonist's hidden potential is unlocked
the former scorners are forced to acknowledge them

examples.text: The body called 'crippled' is revealed to host a rare constitution; the very flaw becomes the engine of ascent.

name: Dao-Heart Tempering
summary: An inner demon surfaces in an illusory trial that replays the cultivator's worst guilt; only by refusing the comforting lie does the dao-heart hold.

beats.label: Inner demon surfaces
beats.intent: the cultivator's doubt takes form

beats.label: False-memory trial
beats.intent: an illusion replays the worst guilt

beats.label: Confront the self
beats.intent: the cultivator must reject the comforting lie

beats.label: Emerge resolute
beats.intent: the dao-heart holds, tempered

preconditions.text: the protagonist carries an unresolved guilt or attachment

effects.text: the protagonist's resolve is tempered and clarified
a vulnerability to illusion or temptation is removed

examples.text: An illusory trial replays the cultivator's worst guilt; only by refusing the comforting lie does the dao-heart hold.

name: Auction-House Treasure
summary: A rare item surfaces at auction; outspent and mocked, the protagonist wins it through a hidden backer or unexpected means.

beats.label: Rare item surfaces
beats.intent: a coveted relic comes to auction

beats.label: Bidding war
beats.intent: rivals drive the price up

beats.label: Rival outbids
beats.intent: the protagonist is outspent and mocked

beats.label: Secret means to win
beats.intent: the protagonist takes it by an unexpected means

preconditions.text: a coveted resource is available through open contest

effects.text: the protagonist obtains the treasure
a wealthy rival is publicly bested

examples.text: A relic surfaces at auction; outspent and mocked, the protagonist wins it by a means none expected.

name: Sect-Entrance Trial
summary: An unranked outsider shatters the testing measure at a sect's entrance trial; the elders fight to claim them, with stakes attached.

beats.label: Arrive unknown
beats.intent: the outsider arrives without standing

beats.label: Underestimated at the test
beats.intent: the gatekeeper dismisses them

beats.label: Exceed the measure
beats.intent: the testing-stone is shattered

beats.label: Recruited with stakes
beats.intent: elders contend to claim them

preconditions.text: an open trial or test gates entry to a faction

effects.text: the protagonist gains a position and patron
a rivalry with the gatekeeping party is seeded

examples.text: An unranked outsider shatters the testing-stone's ceiling; the elders fight to claim them.

name: Life-and-Death Duel
summary: A duel to the death is sworn on the arena; the favored son loses the instant he believes he has won.

beats.label: Challenge issued
beats.intent: a duel is called

beats.label: Stakes sworn
beats.intent: death is set as the price

beats.label: Duel turns
beats.intent: the tide shifts unexpectedly

beats.label: Fatal reversal
beats.intent: the favored party falls at the moment of certainty

preconditions.text: a public, high-stakes confrontation is sworn

effects.text: a rival is decisively defeated, often fatally
the protagonist's standing is transformed

examples.text: A duel to the death on the arena; the favored son loses the instant he thinks he has won.

name: Bottleneck Resource Hunt
summary: Stalled below a wall, the cultivator hunts a guarded essence into a deadly range and breaks through on its power.

beats.label: Rank stalls
beats.intent: progress halts at a wall

beats.label: Resource named
beats.intent: the needed essence is identified

beats.label: Perilous acquisition
beats.intent: claim it from a deadly range

beats.label: Consume and advance
beats.intent: break through on its power

preconditions.text: the protagonist is blocked at a bottleneck
a specific resource is known to break it

effects.text: the protagonist acquires the needed resource
the protagonist advances a rank

examples.text: Stuck below a wall, the cultivator hunts a guarded essence into a deadly range and breaks through on its power.

name: Master-Disciple Debt
summary: Saved or taught by a reclusive master, the disciple owes an unpayable debt that is called due at the worst possible hour.

beats.label: Rescued or taught
beats.intent: the master saves or instructs the protagonist

beats.label: Unpayable debt incurred
beats.intent: an obligation beyond easy repayment is created

beats.label: Debt called in
beats.intent: the master demands repayment at a hard hour

beats.label: Loyalty test
beats.intent: the disciple's fidelity is tested

preconditions.text: the protagonist receives life-changing aid or teaching

effects.text: a binding obligation ties the protagonist to the master
the protagonist's loyalty is proven or broken

examples.text: Saved by a reclusive master, the disciple owes a debt that is called due at the worst hour.

name: Tribulation Ascension
summary: Accrued power draws the heavens' wrath; nine waves of lightning tribulation must be survived to ascend, anchored by an ally.

beats.label: Merit accrued
beats.intent: power reaches the ascension threshold

beats.label: Heavens take notice
beats.intent: the tribulation gathers

beats.label: Lightning tribulation
beats.intent: wave after wave must be endured

beats.label: Ascend or fall
beats.intent: survive to ascend, or be undone

preconditions.text: the protagonist has reached an ascension threshold

effects.text: the protagonist ascends to a higher plane or realm
their old world standing is left behind

examples.text: Power draws the heavens' wrath; nine waves of tribulation must be survived to ascend.
